name: Additional rate taxpayer
description: Single person earning £150,000 - additional rate (45%) tax band, personal allowance fully eliminated

sources.description: Verified via official HMRC PAYE Tax Calculator and arithmetic validation using official 2026/27 rates
sources.notes: Income tax and National Insurance contributions verified against official HMRC calculator. NI calculation validated arithmetically using official rates: 8% on £12,570-£50,270, 2% above £50,270. Income tax validated using progressive brackets: 20%, 40%, 45% on taxable income after personal allowance deduction.
